availability_assumptions.coverage: Month/quarter-end flags fail absent outside committed calendar coverage years; OPEX and quad-witch use analytic third-Friday arithmetic.
availability_assumptions.timezone: Session-local America/Chicago conversion follows the committed CME index futures session template.
availability_assumptions.timing: Feature available_ts equals the current input row available_ts; all calendar inputs are known before that row is available.

duplicate_or_equivalent_exposure_notes.summary: Related to offline bars_to_roll/minutes_to_roll countdowns, but not equivalent and does not use future contract transitions; this flag is known-ahead analytic roll-window membership.

formula_sketch.operation: roll_guard.classify_roll_window(local bar_start_ts, analytic quarterly roll calendar, root_symbol=instrument_id).in_roll_window using default 2-before/1-after window
